Please ensure that when you are reading reviews that they are current.

Our experience was anything but positive. We gave them a 50% deposit as requested in October 2024 to recover our deck with Flexstone in the early spring.

May 2025 was eventually promised as the latest install date after numerous calls and emails from us to them from January onwards.

This date passed with more emails from us to them and in June 2025 they said they might be able to come out mid July.

We were not convinced that they would hold true to their word again so we asked them for a refund of our deposit which they said was possible minus a restocking fee.

Numerous phone calls and emails to them again went on until August 2025 with still no action.

We eventually contacted our credit card company who helped us out in October 2025 as the merchant did not.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Peterson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZZvLjEuKUCSadeMd8ZYoQT-c1d0JNB_ZqU221Ql-anvtZwg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"TJ & crew did an excellent job. We highly recommend this company for anyone interested in a top quality roofing project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erin Gavin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVu8-6T_Yun_iVsXSonnP3--FJD36ASkrs94AGrkw0mXxVINEzX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would recommend TF Roofing in Vernon 100%. Definitely will be back 💜","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tehnubinatub","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdT76Zwy19jfmQoX8crkCQjPGziWmi7n0ovHB6_1i4LDxW4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I just got some tattoos done by Paul while his wife chatted us up and we are so happy with the work we got done. Amazing experience that I will be recommending to anyone going on a tour through BC like we were. Thanks so much Paul and Steph! Can't wait to see you again and all the best to you and your business.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ella torwalt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDrTtsxyEuFVjReiomt8XE6ibN173hYmxNxJVjto1GfJu9NMWL=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place so much!! They give you everything you need to take care of your tattoos once you leave, and if you have Emma as your Artist, you get a little trinket 💕","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Small Axe Roadhouse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHHcSn40rWNpl87stBO8YvsNlbBJCznWvbgrE2fd-luZRhLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Always a great experience at enderby Tattoo!

I trust and love his work so much that he’s recently completed both the sides of my neck. You don’t just go to anyone for a spot like that.
Happy to have Enderby tattoo so close and willing to bring my tattoo visions to life. A great addition to our little town!
Thanks guys!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah-ann Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeTvJZMP_jx9zN4npoADKW0w3jmHuKdA8GZU7KCFJ8aqTfVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"excellent experience. artist Paul very easy to work with and can make jokes and hold good conversation while he stabs you with his needles. it was fun to be in their shop lots of unique items to look at made by Paul himself.. would definitely recommend popping in or making an appt and get your next tattoo here.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Meredith Kinney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoRNjj2LnEnu0M7ujM1g-bXUEMa4aR6Q32E_4GKijWQSOR-9y8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Called ahead for fresh wedges, but unfortunately they weren’t ready when I arrived.

The young staff at the front counter were patient and courteous, even under pressure—which I appreciated. It’s worth noting there’s no bell or system for alerting staff when they’re working in the back, which can lead to frustrated customers. Honestly, I feel for the team—it’s not an easy setup.

The space itself isn’t messy, but with a Tim’s on-site, the seating fills up fast.

All in all, it’s a gas station location, so expectations should be kept in check. Still, with a bit more coordination, it could offer a smoother experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Trenia Chisholm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKL54m9386sDX9iJP7qenAsYQQ8i9SuAlzGCWNAz-xgaa8E-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Friendly. Price of gas is good. A the outside attendant is nice and helpful and very friendly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"samantha stevens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUGmh814pTHrJXSu-c6VSoH3qVvqcncz2u9UQpxPyta_WdTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Their full service is absolutely terrible. Nine times out of 10. We go there and either get completely ignored or it takes up to 15 minutes to get service. Full service is really the only reason why we go there specifically rather than use one of the other two gas stations in town. Today when I said something to the girl after she had opened the gas cap on my car and washed my windows but failed to take the money or actually start pumping the gas. She told me she was busy with other customers. I don't understand how that's true. If you have the time to wash the windows and open the gas cap, you certainly have time to take the money and pump the gas. It would have taken two more seconds to do that before she moved on. I waited patiently for 10 minutes before finally saying something and then leaving. This company has lost my business forever","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"White N Wild Snowmobile Tours-Banff/Canmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvk1PV1TQntpVhXuYmBR9PuVfW6ehHQ4wQ8x3HFj1EkhXJwGjq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our first time reviewing a gas station but we feel it’s necessary!
We always fill up at this beautiful station on our trips between Golden and Vernon- always great service at the pumps, a lovely gift shop, Tim Hortons and Chesters Chicken available inside.  We were served by two young fellows the other day, one was the cook and one was working the till.  We had a good chat while they got our chicken ready! Always  a favorite stop!! 😀.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amor de Cosmos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXneznWEwgZ97lx-4lDcLgojOZug4lktYGD71NCXCh4IhHWewKD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic gas station with a huge convenience store, gift shop, fried chicken, Tim Hortons, full serve gas, and car wash all housed in a beautifully designed and appointed building. Very easy to access from the highway.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"dan Maisonneuve","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY1BbOMduu2hqonuZncMjvoH2QN3bQFpewYaQP_kmbFtlH_Ht1hA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Don't waste your money on the car wash! Out of order half the time.  Pay extra for spotless wash? It's regular water loaded with minerals.  Have fun trying to get them off when it's 30 degrees out.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"rod n","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJY7F4-pxzp_qd3OaVmUi10ZwBQicaX9at9Y9eBe6PSEvAUWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing service! Haven't seen service like this anywhere in the last 40 years. Jumped to the pump offered to pump my gas and clean my wifes windshield!!!!  Whaaaat!!! True story!!!!
Washrooms were spotless!
It's amazing to see business's that still understand what customer service is!
100 stars for you and we will make a point of going out of our way to support your business
Thank you !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kandoo Ooo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKyRbbKWAYnfXAFKQ4uaVD5VxKvt-3eaJA09-Lpwm74elu7KIK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent full service gas stop with a large bay car/truck wash. They have gas and diesel. Easy access off/ on the highway going towards Vernon, especially if you're hauling a trailer since it's a large gas station.  Recommend fueling up here before getting to Vernon/kelowna as they're a bit cheaper than the rest of the Okanagan. They have Tim Hortons and a snack shop. Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We were extremely pleased with his work.
Now in 2026 we needed to replace our shingles and eavestroughs again.  We started our search for a reputable company to do this and were surprised to find out that Randy was still doing business in Vernon but now it is a family business with Randy as their roofing manager. The name of their company is North OKGN Construction.
Because of our previous experience with Randy we hired them to do our roof and eavestroughs and were not disappointed.  From start to finish the job was done exactly like the contract that we agreed to with Randy overseeing the job. He used 2 excellent roofers doing the work that took 4 days to complete.  Randy was at the jobsite every day making sure it was done correctly.
Thanks for your professionalism.
We highly recommend North OKN Construction for any of your roofing needs.
Denis and Mary Dombrowski, Vernon, B.C.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiuO3Zc1b5Qz-f77zo2agQfrnYDVJVP2MA2u0vW8ZIvTx_tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From quoting to completion, the team were excellent to work with. 5 star recommendation.
John Willis","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRFVf2_tEtpmM97Jh5W4kOMzWhi7Wa6ZeTL3neO9q6qkNGMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honest people, great communication, showed pictures of the work completed, very professional repair. I will use North OKGN Construction again, and will recommend to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gordon Passmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUW0ocQjkLlYJH1_jLXLZUb8P4ZoP2IAc6OfwdzrEfCwxzuwuCDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! Where to start.  Firstly Randy is super approachable and just such a down to earth guy.  Easy to talk to, prompt, and explains things in a way that made sense to me (I’m not a trades guy).  I told him directly, to his face, that I was looking for a quality product, that will last, and at a reasonable price.  And boy did his team delivery.

They put together a detailed, easy to follow, and well laid out quote for the requested service plus additional services that I may benefit from.  All of which were clearly labelled and with some explanation (again, I’m not a trades guy) easy to understand.

I quickly made the decision to go with this company, payment was easy, communication was proactive, timely, and relevant.  They did a terrific job managing expectations and ensuring I knew what was happening.

When they arrived on site and throughout the project everyone was pleasant and friendly.  Even my kiddo remarked how friendly the workers were.  The team absolutely flew through this project, including replacing… the roof boards? I have already forgot what the wood planks are called, and the shingles, in 3.5 business days.  The final price came in slightly below quoted, which was not expected but a stunning surprise.  Not only was the quality of work exceptional but they cleaned up quickly and thoroughly.  You can’t even tell they were here.  And again, they use direct debit to your account which makes payment super easy.

Everything about the customer experience has been meticulously thought of and executed.  They don’t leave anything to chance.  Stop reading reviews and just hire this company, they truly are phenomenal.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Russell Bula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxOXqWtjE8BCye0u7nSz6NYGd2WLioQtYhjgA3YaAZFclALQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Randy and his team were a delight to work with over the 2 weeks they re-sided our 2500 sqft bungalow. The quality of their work is outstanding and small changes we requested along the way were handled without issue or delay. Of particular importance to us was that they stayed on the job until it was finished and it was completed to our satisfaction in the time Randy said it would take. They left the entire property clean of building scraps and packaging materials. Even our neighbors remarked that we chose an excellent contractor for this job.
We definitely would recommend North OKGN Construction for any roofing or siding project .","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mochi Coco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKr_cKOGTuVQdp8Gq9W5fBYwfDtLxt8RkJiJJTz9K1OHzl1yQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Exceptional care for our heritage home!

I am truly grateful to have worked with Roof Doctor and highly recommend them. They worked on our heritage house in Kelowna, and from start to finish, the experience was smooth, trustworthy, and very reassuring.

I would especially like to thank Dave, who was an absolute pleasure to work with. He was kind, patient, and always took the time to explain things clearly. Caring for a heritage property requires extra attention and responsibility, and Dave handled everything with great respect and professionalism. His thoughtful communication and steady support gave me real peace of mind throughout the process.

The roofing work was done beautifully, and all inspections and required documentation were handled carefully and properly. It meant a lot to know that our heritage home was in such capable and honest hands.

Thank you, Dave, and thank you to the entire Roof Doctor team. I truly appreciate your dedication and integrity, and I would gladly recommend you to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken Clarke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNRLlUN9iLTCItwgBS-IUd7KrjlHPjOdxw2Y3Siv7_7juxrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Extremely efficient and highly skilled installers led by Leo and his crew. From the staff in the office and this crew everything was completed to our complete satisfaction. We highly recommend the Roof Doctor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hot Welder","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTFUcSypOFrCcVicAiNzvgxsH4svTIHjPb-XrLw2AJJUV8J3I=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for a roofing contractor to re-roof my daughter's house in Kelowna. Initially spoke with Dave Ferguson, when picking up coffee one morning.

He gave me a contact at their nearby shop and I then spoke with Howard, and indicated that my daughter's home was in urgent need of a new roof and winter was almost here.

He promptly provided a comprehensive quote, addressing our additional needs; exhaust vent, and carport re-roof as well.

I had spoke with a couple of other roofers prior, but their pricing and warranty didn't come close.

The contract was signed and his crew showed up within a couple of days as promised and had both roofs stripped, substrate repairs & ice damming protection done, and re-roof completed within a few days. All construction debris was cleaned up the following day.

All in all, great service at a great price.
Many Thanks to Howard and the Roof Doctor Team!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"King Cee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJc5i6nWpFdBJS1vUGKmwcSPSxdmlRlN_uBk5cIO-AxK7UUuQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Okanagan Jewish Community Centre thanks Howard and his staff at Roof Doctor for their work on our building. They replaced the shingle roof, the flat torch roof and all the gutters.  Howard is very good at his job and communicating with him on the phone was very easy.  He's a pro when it comes to roofing issues, is easy to talk to,  has a good sense of humour, knows his roofing, made good suggestions about colours and products and there were always follow up calls after each job.  The site was always tidy  and now that we have had every square inch of our roof replaced, it remained dry during the recent rains.  Thx to the team at Roof Doctor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"DENNIS WARNER","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRORrFUpyHalCVkesIUO7IPskEUptgGqWwxt_0s2Y5iu0UVQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've used Roof Doctor twice for repairs and have been very happy with the results. title: Storm Proof Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jaime Martins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpnTacGHFGv-Qn5VqyfVQVA3jwMYt51t1TyINvzX5lMeTWcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been so happy with Damien and his team getting a roof done at my mother‘s house as well as another roof at my own. A few of the things for me that distinguish professionals is consistency, transparency, and integrity. Throughout this entire process, Damien consulted with us, ensured we were comfortable with the proposal, checked in often, and while working pointed out issues that were critical (formally incorrectly, installed venting) that two other vendors ignored and covered up in prior work. Damien‘s expertise in, quite literally, storm proofing a home was apparent given the quality of materials used, and the waterproofing system installed. I couldn’t be happier!
His team were incredibly polite and considerate, working diligently, and obviously proud of the work they were doing. It was such a pleasure to have them and I am so incredibly happy with the look of my new roof and how clean they left the job site. I got incredible value for the investment and feel like I can relax for the next many decades at least! Thank you, Damien and team! 10/10!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maxime Lessard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkol1Fl8hAUL-yGAiOmvSx7jIHsraUVP9FCQTK_zeLhvWNmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Damian and his crew replaced our roof about a month ago. The job was very well done and our home looks pretty sharp now with black shingle. Damian was very transparent in is work and communicated the work to be done. The price was competitive and the crew left the place very clean and picked up any nails left on the yard. All good stuff here, I recommend giving him a shout for a quote.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liam Fitzgerald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMwBiVEZU1LJ9qsIXk2Ow-SMwDPTJ7qRT6vJMZe8ifWWNKydk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are extremely pleased with the work Storm Proof Roofing did for us. Damien came out to look at a minor issue with the roof on our previous house and gave us his advice for no cost. We moved and the new house needed a roof replacement so we got Damien to give us a quote and approximate schedule. We got other quotes as he suggested and because of our previous interaction with him we decided to have Storm Proof do the work. They advised us of the start date about a month ahead and started on that date, they told us how long it would take and stuck to their timeline. They told us the cost and stuck to their quote. All in all a very professional organization. Damien and his employees seem genuinely happy to be doing the work and do an excellent job with care and skill. After they finished the job site was spotless and my roof looks fantastic. I have a roofing inspector in the family and he told me "They did a really good job!"
Thank you Damien and crew.
We wholeheartedly recommend Storm Proof Roofing, choosing them was one of the best decisions I have made.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp596GgQE&fid=0x0:0x853499c4fc9e4658"],"When":"2023-8-30"},{"Name":"Harold Schroth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5eIhiKo43V14Yg2aTqI2qoZ370BIKXxNOLuyZYxyocneVUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are looking for a high quality roofing job, call Damien - it’s his attention to detail that makes the difference on how your roof performs over the long-term.  More nails per shingle, W flashing in the valleys, diverter pieces so rain goes in the gutter instead rotting your facia plus much more… it all adds up to you still being confident about your roof many years from now.  His crew is polite and courteous and they clean-up meticulously after the job is done.  This is the company you want to call!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Mckerracher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKGUK2w6RGm7HSXnWJduWiIP3y_aV135p6tlo6IUR5aessEFVs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Damien helped me last minute after a windstorm ripped some tiles off my roof. As always you get great service and straightforward answers. There aren’t many honest people left in the trades but Damien is definitely one of them. Highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marin Carruthers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuOzKL7d6VSeE89jT2U7bpnGjBhcK6d9qeJGPNAgNE-m7ucQ0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an excellent experience with this roofing company from start to finish. They were incredibly quick and efficient, stuck to their timeline, and cleaned up thoroughly when the job was done. Most importantly, the roof looks absolutely amazing, and the quality of work truly shows. We would highly recommend them to anyone looking for professional, reliable, and high-quality roofing work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jess Leboe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXh7Rbb2KZlPz9uFKTuBbUPRKmY4d6k2K4YeJ-x1b8W-9gOMss=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Damien and his crew at Storm Proof Roofing did exceptional work on our roof! They were very professional through the whole process. Great attention to detail, and a customer-centric approach made the entire experience seamless and stress-free. From initial consultation to final inspection, he showed a commitment to quality and excellence that's hard to find. Their friendly, courteous service made us feel valued and confident in their abilities. I highly recommend Storm Proof Roofing to anyone seeking a reliable, trustworthy, and skilled roofing company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Jacobsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7Smh9qQy098kxxDQXFkHGfizSuJTF37J3iV6U1b8hjJqPjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend Damien and Storm Proof Roofing enough. We had some shingle problems on a recently-purchased house that came to light when we were having solar panels installed. I contacted Damien who came the same day and replaced the problem shingles. On top of that, the pricing was fair. This was not even his installation, and he pointed out the problems with the workmanship that led to the problems and how they do things differently to avoid such problems. So, you can be confident if you go with Storm Proof, you will not be dealing with the consequences of substandard work. I know I won’t be calling anyone else for our future needs. I can’t say enough about their responsiveness and attention to detail.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We had some occasional storm damage, and they were quick to respond and repair, even 15 years after the original work.
Pinnacle provided us with a clear quote, with details about options that were available.  When we chose to proceed, they communicated clearly about timelines and expectations.  Their crew was efficient, polite, safety-conscious, and very respectful of us and our property. They left the worksite tidy and clean every day. The work was completed on time and without any inconvenience to us.
Pinnacle did two inspections upon completion, one to ensure everything was completed to specifications and that everything was cleaned up, and a second by a manager came to ensure it was finished professionally.  We were then provided with a final bill which was clear and accurate, with no surprises.

I can not say enough good things about this company!  Their workmanship is top quality, their communication and business practices are excellent, and their staff were a pleasure to have at our home. Too often they give you a price but that soon changes once they start the job. I own a number of properties and won't go anywhere else after dealing with Unit Roofing. They saved me thousands of dollars with superior workmanship, communication and knowledge. They are well spoken, intelligent and professional. They went well beyond the expected with extras. We went to one of their sites to check their work first, so I don't have any issue with anyone driving by the property where they did the roof and facia on. 784 Burne Ave. I know you will be impressed as well. The larger companies often contract out their work to others or are too busy to do a good job. You won't find that here. Only excellence. Not for one second will you feel like a number. My tenants loved them as well. They truly do care and take such pride in their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"shelora sheldan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUyL6JQww46fMTqVHkLQLh8gnQffmc9U5WLYmR0u1GUWR4j8OX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Buyer Beware!!! Needing to replace the roof of our flat-top house in Penticton, we received a glowing review of Unit Roofing from a neighbour who had hired John and his partner Richelle to do the replacement roof on their flat-roof house, using Malarkey Omni Seal roofing. And his online reviews were all five stars – praising his communication, hard work, and honesty. So we felt confident proceeding with the project. What transpired from day one was the opposite! In fact this has turned into a nightmare.

While all the other reviews praised John's swift communication, we cannot say enough about the sorry lack of proper and professional communication from him. Once he had our down payment, things went downhill from there. Little to no communication started on the day he was to show up  for the job. We couldn’t get a confirmation from him. For example, his phone’s mailbox was full and there was no response from repeated emails and texts. When he finally responded, he said he would be showing up the first day at 8 AM. 9 AM came around. Then 10 AM. Then 10:30. He showed up closer to 11.

What was promised to be a two day job – with a half third day to tie up loose ends – turned into a four day job. And it’s still unfinished. Promises are at the heart of this deplorable experience. Be aware that John Fitzgerald over-promises and under-delivers! Two examples: a promotional solar vent from his rep was promised but suddenly not available, and his “gutter guy that can do the a solid length of replacement gutter” also never materialized. But so much worse is that John never showed up to put the finishing touches on our new roof. He promised to show up two days after ‘completion’ to do the finishing touches last Thursday, but an email explaining another fiasco at another job – he seems to be plagued with tragedies – he wanted to show up late on the Friday, or giving us a choice, he could come by on the Saturday to “ .... We agreed on Saturday.
Saturday rolled along. We waited all day. He never showed. We couldn’t get a hold of him: mailbox full, no response to emails, no response to texts.

To add insult to injury, what has transpired during this frustrating time was rain. The rain showed pooling along the edge of the back roof slope. The pooling has been caused by the fact that existing flashing from the previous tar-and-gravel roofing was not removed and was creating a dam, retaining water from flowing over into the gutter. Worse, at each corner end, rainwater drips behind the flashing/gutter! My husband had brought this possibility up to John during the roofing job, but John passed it off, saying that the water will flow over the edge into the gutter (wrong!)
We unwisely paid the balance of the payment the day he was finishing up, with his promise to return in two days to tie ends up: heat torch any unsealed edges, caulk flashing, etc. He never showed. Frustrating!

After contacting his partner, Richelle (Office Manager), and John’s mother, who lives in Penticton and had visited the job site several times, he contacted us via text with an angry note, claiming out of the blue that we had already received a $2750 discount and that we would have to pay for any further work. (WHAT? AT NO POINT WAS THERE ANY DISCOUNT DISCUSSED!) And claiming that we were unprofessional in trying to contact him through others. He stated he would show up Sunday (yesterday) at 1 PM. No show. No email, no text, no phone call. No response.

We are sick to our stomachs and completely frustrated that we are now left with an unfinished job, no recourse for compensation and a roof that in all likelihood will have to be repaired. The professionalism that others have experienced with Unit Roofing seems to have withered away.
We have now called another company to help us through this mess!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Rae Stobert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAPnBqjIwcBL6y0OOM5r0Eb_IFVUAJKED_wQeQFmEwkifuDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cannot recommend them enough! They worked with me on what I wanted and gave helpful suggestions on what would work best while still being affordable. Never had a mess which since I have 2 small children was so important. Will never use anyone else again. Just excellent! Thanks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Ivan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8Bs-gNZiBONXHuMeZYigJaeUEO7I3_Qp8bvPRkBvga_F_8fNVzg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The install of our moon tunnel was carried out professionally and we are very happy with the result! Would definitely recommend this business to others!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse Sylvester","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbfBdUrDwvrWNDHSbVz8cFuU5BNqJ_NXxG6M_4sUylA0-dZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great prompt service! user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Barbara Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrRGvyV8rlVHq3o_joh6LEmx0UJ00k29Tp2f2ip3OoZiKhybuJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Integrity is the most honest roofing company I have ever dealt with! I very highly recommend this company, I will be using them in the future as well as recommending to friends family and neighbors!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Nodelyk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUweAqdcFRAbbaIBpJmt80ofAMqq4LhQ4i3uWS0Nq__VuXw_M80UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Installation was great, but cleanup poor. I spent several days picking up nails from my lawn - hundreds of them. Also the plastic strips on the underside of every shingle that overhangs is coming off in little bits and a year and a half after installation I'm still cleaning that stuff up. Top notch installation but poor work on the details. Wouldn't recommend.

Edit two and a half years after installation:
Every time the wind blows, I am reminded of Integrity Roofing. The plastic from the underside of all the shingles around the edge of the roof is slowly starting to come off. Now they are incessantly fluttering in the breeze with a crinkling sound like a candy wrapper. This sucks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDc4OLTBQ&fid=0x0:0xfe3997aaa8cf3c2a"],"When":"2020-5-13"},{"Name":"Laura Bontron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJzO-z5w0V_5cNqqLKIs-PJk1_X49XjSOVkvVDwLHa8zwD4WQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"UPDATE 17APR23:
Integrity Roofing did respond to our calls/email and it was their preference to issue a refund due to our dissatisfaction with the work completed.

************

We hired Integrity Roofing to repair a leaky skylight at our recreational property in Blind Bay in August 2022. Understandably they were busy but agreed to do the work, after waiting several months we had closed our property for the season prior to them doing the work in October 2022 when we weren’t there. We paid on time for the work completed $1,522.59 however when we returned to the property this Spring and inspected the work it was not done well or satisfactory. The frame the the skylight sits on is made from a piece of lumber that shouldn’t have even been sold, it framing is crooked, the interior surround has been cracked, there are gaps not filled, the skylight is scratched, new roof tile was not installed around the flashing. We have called several times to discuss and they refuse to return our calls. Very disappointed, would not recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Len Youden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCqgB-1EyohD6iLbr6zf_Qt1Ye01_EV3ERzHTJ35BTkX24XQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had our detached garage/shop roof done with gutters by integrity roofing. title: KC's Contracting & Custom Torchworks
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"J V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLV8pLthfaYcDNL7w2kYS0R1NVBHzEBlAdGoYlLmhXDHKRTeexD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Without a doubt the best roofing company in the Okanagan. This was my first time hiring a roofing contractor and having heard horror stories from others I knew I had to do my diligence in selecting the right company to do our roof replacement. I set out to get 3 quotes but ended up getting 5 in total, as 2 of the companies that came did not have their own liability insurance (why are you here then?). I am very glad that I happened to ask a good friend of mine if they ever had roof work done, and they suggested KC's Contracting & Custom Torchworks. John stopped by the day after I contacted him and from the first 30 seconds of meeting him I knew he and his company were the ones to do the job. I awarded them the contract as soon as I received the quote. It was still a big leap of faith as this is our first year living in our first home and had to drain the emergency fund to get this done. So when Andrew, Brady and company stopped by at 7am sharp on the day they said they would be here and set to work, I breathed a huge sigh of relief. And they did not disappoint! The work ethic of these guys was nothing short of impressive. They barely stopped from daybreak to dusk, and as I was home for most of the 3 day job I was able to observe their attitude, professionalism and camaraderie as a team throughout the day.  I learned that two of them are also volunteer firefighters so they understand the science of using open flames around combustible materials, which gave me confidence in their skill with the torch-on section of the roof. The job was completed as promised, and everything we could hope to expect: fair price, reasonable timeline, quality workmanship and a clean site to finish.

To summarize, I am a new homeowner and this was my first time hiring a contractor. Getting my roof replaced was a big deal to me. After dealing with KC's Contracting, I would never hire anybody else for this type of job. They gave me the peace of mind I hired them for: a roof over our head. HIGHLY RECOMMENDED. Thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4tejqIA&fid=0x0:0xff9b784319244691"],"When":"2018-12-8"},{"Name":"Tamilyn Severin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv4WO2BZ49eYZSwULbKJ2FmK3v79-q7zoqQ_Rjov5DHOtmXHU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofing Rules ..

3. Call John or Andrew at KC Contracting to come fix your mess!!

In this day and age customer service seems to be a luxury, but from the first moment of contact I was super impressed with this company. Even thou our little home is a drop in the bucket for them as they take on huge jobs , John made me feel like it was important and my peace of mind mattered. The quote was not the lowest  but it was the most professional,inclusive of what I asked for and truly wasn’t that far off the others I gathered.

I also talked to other roofers who’s recommendation of KC stood out as the pitch of my roof is ridiculously low That coupled with their BB rating and previous reviews from customers made up my mind. The decision made I contacted John who promptly put me me in to their busy schedule and assured me all would be well. He was right.

When Andrew showed up to assess and drop the dump trailer off his friendly personable knowledgeable manner set me immediately at ease and I knew I was in good hands & I boy was I right. He & his FANTASTIC courteous crew rocked the roof and by time I got home  they were done .. 😁👌🏼 Including cleaning even checked my driveway and area for wayward roofing nails .

Just awaiting the sub-contractor to complete the soffits and eavesthroughing & this roofing nightmare will finally be behind us once and for all THANK YOU JOHN , ANDREW & KC Crew .. you get 5 stars from us all day long 😉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE_4uXSg&fid=0x0:0xff9b784319244691"],"When":"2019-3-31"},{"Name":"Derrick Kish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5gMENgJI6fwIiutNtQrCRU5fm_mLZkVXv0TpebrsWhgbZLg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic service. Thanks a ton for your work and customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Gast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK64HsxJ7YwxadHcObn-d00ghg3TNEuq_If0pEAQSust1RIiQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Five star all the way!!!

Angelo is a delight to work with , and as mentioned elsewhere, has excellent manners, as do his workers.
They went out of their way to oblige when I requested a small extra repair.

I highly recommend this company and if I ever need further work, I would go straight back to them.

[{"Name":"Richard Fleming","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVozYx2z5DuL4vCd_b6wRfo0eziVzrzFPr4JjM2xOsj94Pu99Tx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I've dealt with Shepherds home hardware for over 25 years and until recently have always been very happy with their service. About a month ago my wife hired the design team to install a counter top in our home we were renovating to sell. Things went well until after the install when we discovered the sink hole was wrong, the caulking was extremely bad and the walls were all damaged. When my wife called to show pictures and complain she got totally blown off by the sales man even tho he admitted he didn't even inspect the work. I called and talked with the manager who informed me his team had done nothing wrong. I ended up having to hire someone to come in and fix their mess. I rated them a 3 only due to their good service in pervious years but Highly Recomend you go elsewhere for your counter top needs.
Update June 11th... I met with Daryl the retail sales manager today at the store. He listened to my concerns,  emphasised that he wished my experience had been dealt with differently. As a manager myself i know that sometimes situations go off the rails. Once thats happened, what's important is how we deal with the fallout. In the end Daryl restored my faith in Shepherds Home Hardware.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEL-W05GX5d-LEQ&fid=0x0:0x91ce1cb4e54eed11"],"When":"2025-6-5"},{"Name":"Steve Breeze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVOX3ocgJTxcQ8L9Zp9iRnZ1nONBCN39uKGktt2tynp8uDdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I didn't catch her name, but. Even after our March 2025 possession, the support has been fantastic. The attention to detail in our home truly exceeded our expectations.

We highly recommend Keith Construction to anyone looking for a quality home builder in the Okanagan.

Thank you!
The Peers Family","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDJn3N87ObWVjJ5ZZzcMxEt&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2025-6-23"},{"Name":"Andre and Lynette de Zwaan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXN7ZKhHPWvymQwaFPPQ0ZwgCw_xf7_MhAc65pQilTpOxEZYwY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I believe we shared a great review of Keith Construction 5 years ago when our home was first completed.  Since that time we have had an ongoing issue with a flooring manufacturer that would not warranty the cupping laminate installed in the lower level.  the floors need to be replaced so Bryce and Mike at Keith Construction were excellent at coming to the table to help with absorbing the cost and managing the job. we can not say enough good things about Keith construction and welcome anyones questions if they have any doubts about hiring Keith Construction for their build project.
We have found them to be very thorough, and competent to complete all work to a very high standard.  communication has always been excellent and everything always very well organized.  We trust this company and will certainly be looking to them next time we build.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI6ra95AE&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2025-4-8"},{"Name":"Christine Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQPP_a9CJ6Vt1-W5lQG39YTyMStY13x-6dmRg0RrRNOZZT5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a long journey before we finally entrusted Keith Construction with the building of our dream home. From the initial consultation to the final touches, the professionalism throughout the build was first rate and truly exceeded our expectations. Every detail was meticulously handled, and we felt supported and informed every step of the way. We are beyond excited with the results, and it feels surreal to finally see our vision come to life. We can't wait to show our home to our family and friends.  Big thank you to Chris, Jack, Doug and Renee for all their support throughout the process.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYvJbMdw&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2025-5-2"},{"Name":"Clara Appleby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKRYrwRsiy3Be658j9WmQZyJqqx8gZ5zVSpoTw8V9wsBF9btA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I talked to several contractors, for the kitchen renovation, the general response was that the project was too small for them to consider.  Bryce from Keith Construction, not only called back, he did a site visit, provided options and guidance before presenting a quote. I cannot say enough good things about everyone at Keith from project manager Tom Saliken, the construction crew and sub-contractors. They were friendly, professional and very respectful. When we needed to get in and out, they always stopped and cleared a path for mom, as she uses a walker and is on oxygen. It was a little hectic as they worked around us but in four weeks, from tear out to painting is done, we had a new kitchen.
I would highly recommend Keith Construction for any renovation project, they are fast, efficient and just nice to deal with.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICX5vCbugE&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2024-10-16"},{"Name":"Kelly Weisner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7bPHom4q7pxiRJYN3c09DcxSPK1xanttoWih0gReM8j0EIA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We built our retirement home in 2025 at Adventure Bay. After looking at lots and interviewing approved builders, we decided on Keith Construction after seeing the quality of the finished homes they built in the area.

The whole process from start to finish was professional, smooth, on time and on budget. If any of you have built a home before you know how stressful it can be. Keith takes all the stress out of the equation making the whole process  a pleasant and memorable experience.

Chris the Chief Estimator found our dream lot and listened to our wish list, coming up with a budget and healthy allowances that were bang on.

Jack put our house design and ideas on paper. He was so patient and understanding, always willing to change things even when we went full circle a couple of times and ended up where we started.

Renee the project coordinator helped immeasurably with selections and updating the software program Keith uses called “Buildertrend” This App keeps you updated with costs, scheduling and even pictures of every stage during construction.

Doug the Senior Project manager was awesome as he kept on top of all the trades and made sure everything was on time and budget & always offered ideas & supplied input.

The trades Keith uses are excellent and after talking to most of them on site, they enjoy working for them and it shows in the finished product.

All the members of the team helped make this project as stress free as possible and are outstanding in their own ways because of all their experience.

We highly recommend Keith Construction if you are thinking of building here in the Okanagan. Every person that we talked to agrees, they are the best!

Thank you Keith Construction!!

Wendy & Kelly Weisner","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rose Goodall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK18MPvQRJUzlecUXFkJFV9yaJUMwir7L9hC3WKj0z9NOOAdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It has been a pleasure working with Keith Construction on building the home of our dreams in the mountains. Even though we reside in Ontario, Keith Construction made each step of the decision making process easy and fluid, with regularly scheduled virtual meetings with their in-house team and our interior designer. We found them to be well-organized, attentive to details, solution-oriented, and quick to address challenges or problems.

Even though it was our home they were building, Keith Construction took the care as if it were their own and we are confident we have a high-quality build. They were efficient and were able to meet a tight build schedule, finishing many months ahead of some of the homes being constructed by other builders in our neighbourhood that started at the same time.

Keith Construction is a lovely, family-owned business and wonderful to work with. We would definitely recommend working with them on a new-home build.

Rose and Darryl Goodall","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBpM72YQ&fid=0x0:0xc41101fc8f579f09"],"When":"2023-1-11"},{"Name":"Lynda Campbell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrCosoC_DzggafuW8Q5RI27fbyM9O3bj4eQZgK83iEj2YloEcR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We built a home in Vernon in 2023 with this fine family owned company. Very easy to recommend Keith Construction and we’re proud to do it!","Images":null,"When":""}]
